Zane Navratil Signature Pickleball Paddle Deals

By fitnest33 • 6/12/2024
equipment

Zane Navratil is the #1 men’s pro and he’s got his own pickleball paddle line. These aren’t just any paddles. They’re made for those who want to improve their game. With Zane Navratil’s Signature paddle, players get power, control, and easy handling.

Key Takeaways:

  • Zane Navratil Signature paddle is designed by the #1 men’s pro, Zane Navratil.
  • Paddles feature Ultra-Raw Carbon, a 6″ elongated handle, and a Shock Foam Edge Guard.
  • Paddle specifications include a PP Honeycomb core, T700 Raw Carbon face material, and a weight of around 8.2 oz.
  • The T700 Ultra-Raw Carbon face material provides exceptional grip and spin, while the elongated handle allows for more power and maneuverability on the backhand.
  • Zane Navratil Signature paddles are USAPickleballApproved and priced at $209.99.

Zane Navratil Signature Paddle Features

The Zane Navratil Signature pickleball paddle is full of great features. It was designed by #1 men’s pro player Zane Navratil. This paddle is all about superb quality and how well it plays.

The main highlight is its Ultra-Raw Carbon face material. This material is both strong and long-lasting. So, the paddle can handle intense play. Plus, Ultra-Raw Carbon helps players control their shots with better grip and spin.

Another big plus is the paddle’s 6″ elongated handle. This feature gives extra space for gripping. It makes two-handed backhands easier, boosting power and precision. With this handle, players can hit the ball harder and faster, giving them an edge.

Shock Foam Edge Guard: Enhanced Consistency

The Shock Foam Edge Guard is a key innovation. It’s a tech developed by ProXR Pickleball that reduces vibration. This means more consistent shots, even on miss-hits. The edge guard makes the paddle more forgiving, improving your overall play.

Combining Ultra-Raw Carbon, an elongated handle, and Shock Foam Edge Guard, the Zane Navratil Signature paddle is top-notch. It’s perfect for all levels, aiming to improve your game. This paddle promises to boost your performance on the court.

Zane Navratil Signature Paddle Specifications

The Zane Navratil Signature pickleball paddle boosts performance on the court. It’s designed with care.

Paddle Core and Face Material

The paddle has a PP Honeycomb core for strength and response. Its T700 Raw Carbon face provides grip and spin. This lets players control the ball better.

Paddle Weight and Dimensions

The paddle weighs about 8.2 oz. It’s a good mix of power and easy handling. It’s 16.5″ long and 7.5″ wide,
which improves shot precision.

The handle is 6″ long for a comfortable grip. The 4″ grip size ensures a secure hold, reducing hand stress. At 14 mm thick, it feels solid.

Technical Specifications:

Specifications Measurements
Paddle Core PP Honeycomb
Face Material T700 Raw Carbon
Weight Approximately 8.2 oz
Length 16.5″
Width 7.5″
Handle Length 6″
Grip Circumference 4″
Paddle Thickness 14 mm

The Zane Navratil Signature paddle excels on the court. It brings power, control, and spin to your game.

Zane Navratil Signature Paddle Review

Players love the Zane Navratil Signature paddle for its high-quality feel and strong power. It is better than other paddles they’ve used.

The paddle’s T700 Ultra-Raw Carbon face helps with grip and spin. This lets players control their shots better, making their play more accurate and effective.

This paddle has a 6″ handle that is longer. It gives players extra power and better control. With this, players can hit stronger shots and play better.

Users say the Zane Navratil Signature paddle beats others they’ve tried. Its excellent grip, power, and control change the game.

It also has a Shock Foam Edge Guard. Players like this feature because it makes the paddle more consistent. It reduces vibrations for better control on tough hits.

The Zane Navratil Signature paddle is a favorite among pros and fans. Its grip, power, and control are unmatched. It’s the perfect choice for improving your game.

This special Zane Navratil Signature paddle makes your play unique. Using it, you feel connected to Zane Navratil’s incredible talent.

The Zane Navratil Signature pickleball paddle is currently sold out. Its popularity and limited edition make it hard to find. Keep an eye on the official Zane Navratil Signature website for new stock updates.

The Zane Navratil Signature Paddle

“The Zane Navratil Signature paddle sets a new standard in pickleball equipment. Its cutting-edge design and superior materials make it a favorite among players of all levels.” – Pro player, Mark Johnson

The Zane Navratil Signature paddle is designed to boost performance. It combines quality craftsmanship and advanced tech. Its Ultra-Raw Carbon face helps players hit precise shots with better grip and spin.

Its 6-inch elongated handle improves grip and makes backhand shots easier. This feature boosts power and control, giving players an advantage.

The paddle also has a Shock Foam Edge Guard. This reduces vibration for more consistent shots and less strain on your hands and wrists. It helps players stay sharp during long matches.

This paddle is perfect for those wanting to take their pickleball game to the next level.

Discover the Zane Navratil Signature collection today. See how the right equipment can elevate your game.

FAQ

What are the features of the Zane Navratil Signature pickleball paddle?

The Zane Navratil Signature pickleball paddle has Ultra-Raw Carbon. It also has a 6″ elongated handle. And, it includes a Shock Foam Edge Guard for top play.

What are the specifications of the Zane Navratil Signature pickleball paddle?

This paddle features a PP Honeycomb core and T700 Raw Carbon face. It weighs around 8.2 oz. Its size is 16.5″ long and 7.5″ wide, with a 6″ handle and a 4″ grip.

What are the reviews for the Zane Navratil Signature pickleball paddle?

Players love the Zane Navratil Signature paddle. They talk about its great feel and power. The grip and spin from the T700 Ultra-Raw Carbon are highlights.

They also like the extra power and easy handling from the long handle.

Is the Zane Navratil Signature paddle a limited edition product?

Yes, the Zane Navratil Signature paddle is a limited edition. This makes the paddle more exclusive and valuable.

Is the Zane Navratil Signature pickleball paddle currently available?

The Zane Navratil Signature pickleball paddle is sold out now. Its demand and limited edition status make it harder to find. Keep checking the official website for updates or new stock.

Where can I purchase the Zane Navratil Signature pickleball paddle?

Check the official Zane Navratil Signature website to buy this paddle. They offer a secure online shop. Plus, there’s free shipping in the lower 48 states.

Are there other Zane Navratil Signature merchandise available?

Yes. Visit the Zane Navratil Signature website to find and buy Zane Navratil Signature themed merchandise.

What does the Zane Navratil Signature collection include?

The Zane Navratil Signature collection offers various pickleball products. The famous Zane Navratil Signature paddle is part of this collection.

Are there any exclusive deals or offers for the Zane Navratil Signature pickleball paddle?

Exclusive deals for the Zane Navratil Signature paddle may be available. Check often for chances to get the paddle at a discount.

Why should I choose the Zane Navratil Signature pickleball paddle?

The Zane Navratil Signature paddle is an excellent choice for serious players. It features Ultra-Raw Carbon, a long handle, and a Shock Foam Edge Guard. It delivers unmatched gameplay and durability.
